item.text: {"case_id":"mtj-031","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":null,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":null,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"该回复按 release review 对象处理：说明当前缺少 git 仓库、源码或 release diff，要求提供 PR/diff/changelog/patch 等审查材料，并承诺按阻断风险、行为回归、兼容性问题、测试缺口和发布建议来审。没有因“audit”词面触发产物强化或方法论循环，符合 negative_control 的 stay-asleep 预期。"}
